title: BlissHome Pure Prue Leith Melamine Side Plates Set of 4 – Vibrant, Unique Colours, Perfect for Indoor & Outdoor Use – Durable, Contemporary Design with 4 Distinct Colourways
features: Vibrant and Unique Design – Hand-moulded plates with cheerful colours ensure no two are the same.
Durable Melamine Construction – Sturdy and long-lasting, ideal for everyday use indoors or outdoors.
Versatile for Any Meal – Perfect for serving appetizers, desserts, or light bites at any occasion.
Contemporary Styling – Features a sleek, modern look with four distinct colourways in each set.
Lightweight and Easy to Clean – Practical and hassle-free for both casual and formal dining.
description: Product Description Dame Prue Leith Well known for her love of colour Dame Prue Leith has created a new collection of melamine tableware for every day indoor/outdoor dining and in early February will be launching a capsule collection of bone china tableware. Having worked extensively in the food business, writing books and appearing regularly on TV Prue has now fulfilled a longstanding desire to create her own colourful products called Pure Prue that she loves using in her own home.
